summary: Route History & Stats Feature - All 11 backend tests passed. Verified all 6 endpoints: POST /api/routes/archive, GET /api/routes/history, GET /api/routes/history/{id}, DELETE /api/routes/history/{id}, GET /api/routes/stats. Frontend archiveRoute store function correctly implemented.

tests.name: POST /api/routes/archive - archives current stops
tests.detail: Returns archived=true with route object containing id, user_id, archived_at, stops array, and summary (total_stops, delivered, skipped, failed, pending, total_weight_kg, total_quantity)

tests.name: POST /api/routes/archive - no stops returns archived=false
tests.detail: Returns archived=false with message when no stops to archive

tests.name: GET /api/routes/history - lists archived routes
tests.detail: Returns routes array with summary only (no stops array) - correct for list view performance

tests.name: GET /api/routes/history/{id} - returns full route detail
tests.detail: Returns complete route with stops array included

tests.name: DELETE /api/routes/history/{id} - deletes route
tests.detail: Returns deleted=true and route_id, verified with subsequent GET returning 404

tests.name: GET /api/routes/stats - returns aggregate stats
tests.detail: Returns total_routes, total_delivered, total_skipped, total_failed, total_stops, total_weight_kg, total_quantity, avg_stops_per_route, avg_delivered_per_route

tests.name: GET /api/routes/stats - structure verification
tests.detail: All expected fields present in stats response

tests.name: Summary weight and quantity calculation
tests.detail: Verified weight (2.5+3.5+4.0=10.0kg) and quantity (3+5+2=10) are correctly summed

tests.name: Full workflow integration test
tests.detail: Complete flow: create stops -> archive -> list -> detail -> delete -> verify 404

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/routes/archive correctly snapshots all current stops with delivery status counts
Summary includes: total_stops, delivered, skipped, failed, pending, total_weight_kg, total_quantity
GET /api/routes/history excludes stops array for performance (summary only)
GET /api/routes/history/{id} includes full stops array for detail view
GET /api/routes/stats uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline for efficient stats calculation
Frontend archiveRoute() in stopsStore.ts correctly calls POST /api/routes/archive and returns boolean
DEV_MODE authentication working correctly - no token needed for testing
test_credentials: DEV_MODE=True uses dev-user-123, no credentials needed
seed_data_creation: Test stops created/cleaned up via pytest fixtures (TEST_HISTORY_, TEST_WEIGHT_, TEST_WORKFLOW_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route History & Stats feature fully functional. 6 endpoints tested: POST /api/routes/archive, GET /api/routes/history, GET /api/routes/history/{id}, DELETE /api/routes/history/{id}, GET /api/routes/stats. Frontend store function archiveRoute() implemented in stopsStore.ts. route_history collection stores archived routes with full stops array and summary stats.

key_findings.archive_endpoint: Working - archives current stops with summary stats
key_findings.history_list_endpoint: Working - returns routes without stops array (performance optimized)
key_findings.history_detail_endpoint: Working - returns full route with stops array
key_findings.history_delete_endpoint: Working - deletes route and returns 404 on subsequent GET
key_findings.stats_endpoint: Working - returns aggregate stats via MongoDB aggregation

mocked_apis_list: Authentication is MOCKED via DEV_MODE env var (dev-user-123)
